programmes.show_description: When dreams turn into plastic surgery nightmares.
Dr Gareth James sees his first ever case of 'whiplash by canine'. William's family struggles to cope with his self-harm. Mohammed is at high risk for heart disease.
Barnsley Casualty is facing one of its toughest shifts to date. With no children's beds available across the whole of Yorkshire, and a department filling up with children.
Dr Emma McMullen operates on a strange pectoral lipoma. Forty-three-year-old Tamzin visits Dr Natalia Spierings who's a specialist in her skin condition, melasma.
The Eggheads compete against the "Seven Hills Students" in a quiz contest.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Visit Thane.tv and browse our selection of award winning home and fitness products that let you do more with less!
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
We meet Janette and her partner, Ray, who enjoy their new life in Spain after retiring from the UK 11 years ago. Janette now runs her candle and wax melts business from their home.
Looking back at some of the best bits of the series, we see best friends and neighbours Bambi and Johnny return from their new home in Huelva.
In Newton Abbot, undercover detective Nush spots a suspicious character in the crowds. She tails the suspect into a card shop but there's a problem - the suspect has disappeared.
On patrol in Derbyshire, the traffic cops tackle a huge variety of criminals, ranging from drunk or drugged drivers to violent county lines drug dealers and organised crime gangs.
One officer narrowly escapes serious injury as he attempts to open the driver's door only for the suspect to suddenly speed off pulling him along the road.
Derbyshire's roads, a magnet for bikers of all kinds, prove to be a nightmare for traffic cops. A motorcycle versus car crash ends up fatal.
A dangerous drug dealer lets far more than the cat out of the bag and name-swapping friends leave the interceptors baffled.
Mac stops a driver for having no insurance and unearths a huge drugs haul, and the chopper tracks down two notorious burglars.
Phil pulls over a Lamborghini that is not all that it seems to be. Mac comes face to face with a gang, and Ange encounters a four-legged foe.
A traveller's account of being robbed at gunpoint turns out to be a lie. When a man's cellar floods with raw sewage the smell of fraud is unmistakable.
Kerrie's apology is too little, too late. Harper backs Tane. David learns a shocking truth.
A shocking diagnosis is revealed. Leah turns to Alf for help. Eden's concerned for her friend.
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Jeanette has resorted to smoking marijuana to help alleviate her chronic pain.
A fire alarm begins evacuation efforts; a man with potential spine injuries is given pain relief while waiting for scan results.
Kettering v Telford have a bloody history off the pitch so cops are braced for trouble. And officers who spot a drug deal, unearth an Interpol arrest warrant for a criminal. (Ep2)
Cara has fallen 50 metres down a waterfall. She has multiple obvious injuries that need urgent care, but Dr Richard Fawcett must also investigate hidden internal injuries.
Dr Natalia Spierings helps Justin who has a genetic condition which means his skin is covered in lumps made up of nerves. Dr Dev Shah is asked to remove a cyst named Egbert.
Enter the Incident Room, where killers are brought to justice. In this episode: how innocent 19-year-old Aya Hachem was caught in the crossfire of a contract assassination.
93-year-old surgery favourite Doris returns with a stubborn chesty cough, while new patient and heart-transplant sports enthusiast Tomasz receives guidance on staying active safely.
A trainee nurse assesses a 49-year-old man rushed in by ambulance. A 58-year-old woman has a life-threatening allergic reaction to nuts. An 86-year-old man has an arm injury.
Dr Dev Shah struggles to treat a football fan who has a painful ball of fat below his ribcage. Dr Emma McMullen deals with a large liquid-filled neck cyst.
The "Pedigree Chums" are determined to out-quiz the Eggheads.

We meet Ellie and Jim who have just got married and also set up their brand-new café in Benidorm.
We meet climbing hostel owners Sam and Rich. They have a coach-load of guests about to arrive, giving them a "mountain to climb" to get everything ready in time.
At West Orchards, Coventry, Paige and Cory chase a suspected thief from a new toy shop in the centre. In London, a masked man bursts into a newsagents armed with a rounders bat. (Ep8)
Traffic cop Karl Jackson is alerted to a possible disqualified driver when a passing car pings up on his ANPR system. He flags the driver, who fails to stop, and a pursuit begins.
Burglary and the theft of cars and vans is a perennial problem for Derbyshire's traffic cops. PC Andy Swift is on the lookout for a car that's been taken from a dealership.
The Traffic Cops are alerted when a car is spotted by police cameras being driven with no insurance. PC Tom Strachan gives pursuit.
Tim is almost mown down by a desperate driver, and Ange gets spooked while on the lookout for a prowler.
A gang of lorry thieves trigger a major manhunt, a young man is busted for heroin possession, and a fraudster is taken into custody.
A petrol thief runs out of gas, the helicopter follows a car thief to the fair and a drunk driver does not have to travel far to be patched up.
Secret filming captures the recovery of a man claiming he can barely walk.  An opportunist tries to catch her insurers napping by claiming for an expensive mattress.
A shocking diagnosis is revealed. Leah turns to Alf for help. Eden's concerned for her friend.
Leah's world crumbles. Eden's out of the loop. Can Levi get through to a stubborn friend?
Kettering v Telford have a bloody history off the pitch so cops are braced for trouble. And officers who spot a drug deal, unearth an Interpol arrest warrant for a criminal. (Ep2)

programmes.show_name: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up!
programmes.show_description: ...Pay Up! Agents Sam and Mark pursue a debt from a man who owes nearly £5k in legal fees. In London, Vlad must recover nearly £35k in unpaid rent - but the debtor lives in Dubai.
Romantic drama starring Dakota Johnson and Jamie Dornan. A shadowy face from the past sets out to disturb the domestic bliss of newlyweds Christian and Ana. (2018)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Romantic drama starring Dakota Johnson and Jamie Dornan. A shadowy face from the past sets out to disturb the domestic bliss of newlyweds Christian and Ana. (2018)
Exploring one of the strangest crimes in modern Britain when twins Ursula and Sabina Eriksson repeatedly ran into traffic on the M6 in an apparent suicide pact. But why? (Ep1/2)
